free_text: Proton-induced reaction on Ti,V,Mn,Fe,Co and Ni
Data for Al, V, Mn, Co.
Data for Ti, Fe, Ni at
The stacks used at Orsay contained 9 and 10 smaller
stacks each consisting of V, Co, Ti, Fe, Ni Foils and
Mn/Ni alloy. The foils had diameters of 20 mm and were
Each of target foils was followed by a 250 mu-m
The stacks used at Louvain La Neuve consisted out of 7
smaller stacks, containing the same elements as the
Orsay stacks. The foils had a diameter of 15.7 mm.
The uncertainties of the proton energies
consider both the thickness of the target foils and
the error introduced by the energy straggling.
The errors quoted for the cross sections
are absolute errors and consider all sources of errors
affecting the determination of cross sections (see
Corrections of BIB- and Data-Sections have
are included and author list is corrected.
